items.title: P1 BE: follow-suit validation
items.body:
Repo: server
Branch: codex/dev-follow-suit-validation-be -> dev (merged PR #6)
Branch evaluation: repo=server, base=dev, task-branch-required=yes, feature branch deleted post-merge
Outcome: server-authoritative follow-suit validation closed with 409 INVALID_SUIT_RESPONSE; contract updated in docs/api-contract.md; GUI/test validated.

items.title: P1 FE: playable-cards guard
items.body:
Repo: app
Branch: codex/dev-follow-suit-ui-guard-fe -> dev (merged PR #4)
Branch evaluation: repo=app, base=dev, task-branch-required=yes, feature branch deleted post-merge
Outcome: playable-cards guard + visual highlight + follow-suit UX coherence closed; GUI validated.
